headline: Ancient Mesopotamia: Cradle of Civilization
description: Mesopotamia gave humanity its first cities, writing, legal codes, and mathematical systems. Sumerians, Akkadians, Babylonians, and Assyrians each built upon earlier innovations.

citation.name: Ancient Mesopotamia: Portrait of a Dead Civilization
The Ancient Near East: A Very Short Introduction (2025 Updated Edition)
citation.author: Podany A.H.

citation.name: Babylon: Mesopotamia and the Birth of Civilization (2025 Edition)
citation.author: Kriwaczek P.
